TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Ta-lin, title = Ta-lin, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ta-lin} }

S.FORM: == Ta-linŚ°Ēśěó == likisiś≠∑ŚŹ≤ itida i Fen-lan-wan nutipa a dadipasan idaw tu ku palutatengaan tu itida nu kun-yen tusa a malebut nu mihcaan idaw tu ku masakaputay nu musakamuay tu Pu-luo a Fen-lan a kamuan nu niyadu'an itini tu a siluma'. MalaE-luo-se atu Kan-sen-na-wi-ya sasiwbayan nu tapang a minatuan, Ta-lin malaDan-may kanatal sa ahebalay a panutekan, itida i caytucaysiw mihcaan nikuda nu Ta-lin u Dan-may ku mikuwanay. . amis nu hetay tawya u kilisetu namin ku itidaay a tademaw. caytuwallim mihcaan ya maci malaHan-sa, cacay Pae-o duma nu De-kuo tademaw nu tukay a cacay misiwbayay atu hitay malaamisay nu tademawan. caylusiplim mihcaan Dan-may pacakayan ni Ta-lin atu Ay-sa-ni-ya amisan a lalaan sipacakay ci Tew-tun a masakaputay. cung-se-ci a Ta-lin u kalepacawan nu tapang a kitidaan. u Si-o atu E'-kuo kalalitemuhan nu sasiwbayan. tidaay nu tademaw makaala tu walu a malebut nu tademawa, enem a bataan idaw ku enem ku langan nu sapiputaw tu sakalepacaw. . kilul malingatu misilud tu kiwkay, De-kuo tabaki ku nipiwawies. caylimnemcay mihcaan Ta-lin alaw mala Zuy-din kitidaa nu lalaan, titida nu Taamisan nikalepacawan tawya, u Ta-lin nu kakitidaan u Zuy-din itida i caypiccaysep mihcaan mikusan, nika itidaay a De-kuo tademaw sakakaay ci Sa-hun pikuwanan madiput nida ku lalangawan atu sakaudip nu kakuwanan. sabaw siwa a mihcaan Ta-lin a kakakulian saan mihidatu madiput ku minatu a tatapangan. sabaw siwa a seci sadikuday nu cacay a bataan, Ta-lin a E-luo-se malamicidekay tu ku icelang. . caysiwcaywal mihcaan tusa a bulad tusa a bataan idaw ku sepat a demiad, saan ku binawlan nu Ta-lin musakamu, nika debungan nu De-kuo a hitay, nikudan sa atu E'-kuo milihida tu Ay-sa-ni-ya malepacaw. Caysiwtusep mihcaan tusa a bulad tusa a demiad atu E-luo-se-su-wi-ay linpan sehuy cuyi kunhe-kuo makakiyaku tu Ta-e, E'-kuo palutatengan tu Ay-ni-ya kunhe-kuo a nipisiteked. Ta-lin mala Ay-sa-ni-ya tukay. sakatusa nu nikalepacawan Ay-sa-ni-ya maluayaw itida i caysiwsipsep mihcaan -caysiwsipcay mihcaan debungan nu Su-lin, caysiwsipcay mihcaan - caysiwsipsip mihcaan debungan naca nu De-kuo, caysiwsipsip mihcaah kinacacayaca debungan nu Su-lin. pacician tu nu Su-lin ku Ay-sa-ni-ya milecapu tu nuhenian tu kun-he-kuo, Ta-lin malaAy-sa-ni-ya Su-wi-ay sehuy cuyi kunhekuo a tukay. 1918ŚĻī2śúą24śó•, . caysiwwal mihcaan Muo-se-ke piunduan, pikasetsetan nu paypay itida i Ta-lin nu wai amis a Pi-li-ta. 1980 . matenesay tu kinaTa-lin nu malatuluay a niyadu'an: Cuo-tan-san "De-yi :Domberg", i likisian u mamikuwan nu ce-ciw, sayaway mikuwanay tina malumanay a tukayan u cucyaw, kilul sa u Taw-tun-cise-tun atu Puo-luo-ti-hay a de-yi-ce siidaay a tademaw, katukuh aydaay nu Ay-sa-ni-ya sihu atu yadahay nu Ta-se-kun atu tapang a kitidaan. :Domberg) , . malumanay a tukay, u sumamaday a Han-sa kapulungan nu niyadu', "binawlan a tukay", katukuh i sabaw siwa a hedek nu mihcaan, ina kitidaan caay kasalitin atu kiwkay. ina kitidaan kapah ku nikacakatan, u tatelungan nu cun-se-ci a niyadu'an. aydaay nu Ay-sa-ni-ya caay tu ka hacica ku tademaw. ŤÄĀŚüéŚćÄ, . ilikisi, Ta-lin nanidebungan, nialawan, lawpesan kinapina a taydan nu kukun mialaw. amica ku nisakatusa nu kitakid a malepacaw, Su-lin kaygun debungan nuheni a mibakuhac ku Ta-lin, nika mahida tu ku malumanay a tukayan, ina malumanay a tukay itida i caysiwsiwpic mahcaan mapasingan i Lin-he-kuo kapulungan nu cudad a nuliwan namaka babalakiay sa. ś≠∑ŚŹ≤šłä, . katukuh tu sabaw lima a se-ci nu hedek, cacay a baluhay nu caylimsiw nu mi a talakaw, ina Ke-de-se masadicemay a nisangaan tu Ta-li-sen-aw-la-hu kiwkay. i caylimsipsiw mihcaan katukuh i caynemtulim mihcaan, u satalakaway nu kitakidan a nisangaan tu lumaan, kinapina a makatuduh atu misabaluhay misangan, aydaay a nisangaan tu talakaw makaala tu caytulu kun-ce. Ta-lin satabakiay nu banaw u Lay-mi-se-te'-hu, u macimacian a tapang nu nananuman. sakatusa a banaw han u Ha-e-ku'-hu. caay kalecad atu duma a macimacian, Ta-lin cacay ku satabakiay nu sauwac itida i Ta-lin nu inakaan a Pi-li-ta. ya dadipasan tada u bangcalay tu sisa maladadiputan nu kanatal. 47 namaka ce-pen-cu-yi sa, nipicumuda tu O-mum, kapah satu ku sakaudip. katuud tu ku micumuday tu Si-o. duma nu kanatal Hun-lan a kakulian taynitu i Ta-lin, picidekan u sasinganganay nu pisiwbayan u se-tu-ke'-man cacakayan. namaka Pai-o cepen a hutieluan kakilukilu sa amisiwbay. tatengan , Ta-lin saan u Cya-li-hu-ni-ya-cuo-si-ku tuse Luo-se-cya-tu-se u malekakaay kina cen-se. . aidanganśóÖťĀä Ya-li-san-ta.Nae-hu-se-ci kiwkay, patideng i caywalsiwsip‚ÄĒcaysiwsepsep mihcaan. šļěś≠∑ŚĪĪŚ§ß¬∑ 1894-1900ŚĻī. masacacay satu, macakat ku pahikukian atu balungaan masasungaay tu ku Ay-sa-ni-ya atu Si-o, sisa ina Ta-lin mala tataydaan nu aidangan a tukay. mahida nikulitan a malumanay a tukayan u lin-he-kuo cudad nu masakaputay nu kitakidan a namaka babalakiya, yadah ku taydaay midang. Liwkan, kakanen mabuwah namin. tataydan nu aidangan u igu namin ku kamu. malumanay a tukay Ay-sa-ni-ya pabalungaan a puo-w'-kuo u satabakiay nu Ay-sa-ni-ya puo-w'-kun, u tataydaan nu katuuday kiya puo-w'-kun. . Ay-sa-ni-ya nipitukubicuan kasenun sa macakat ku sakaudip, macakat macakat ku tuud. caay tu kaw tadamatekesay, nika caay tu pikikaka tu Tun-o a kanatalan. tusa ku tapang nu tataydaan midan. caay ka tabaki kya sumamaday a maci, hamaw han muculil mamintu adihan. walian a Pi-li-ta niyadu'an atu Ka-de-li-aw u tataydaan tu a midang. Ay-sa-ni-ya sakayhekal a Puo-w'-kun itida i tipan, micapi tu Luo-ka-a-e-ma-lei, mahida tu ku Ay-sa-ni-ya niyadu'an a lalangawan atu sangan nu lumaan.
S.PHON: == ta-r~…ĺin** == r~…ĺikisi** itida i f…ôn-r~…ĺan-wan nutipa a dadipasan idaw tu ku par~…ĺutat…ôŇčaan tu itida nu kun-j…ôn tusa a mar~…ĺ…ôbut nu mińß ¶aan idaw tu ku masakaputaj nu musakamuaj tu pu-r~…ĺuo a f…ôn-r~…ĺan a kamuan nu nijadu Ē~ °an itini tu a sir~…ĺuma Ē~ °. mar~…ĺa…ô-r~…ĺuo-s…ô atu kan-s…ôn-na-wi-ja sasiwbajan nu tapaŇč a minatuan, ta-r~…ĺin mar~…ĺadan-maj kanatar~…ĺ sa ańß…ôbar~…ĺaj a panut…ôkan, itida i ¶ajtu ¶ajsiw mińß ¶aan nikuda nu ta-r~…ĺin u dan-maj ku mikuwanaj. . amis nu ńß…ôtaj tawja u kir~…ĺis…ôtu namin ku itidaaj a tad…ômaw. ¶ajtuwar~…ĺr~…ĺim mińß ¶aan ja ma ¶i mar~…ĺańßan-sa, ¶a ¶aj pa…ô-o duma nu d…ô-kuo tad…ômaw nu tukaj a ¶a ¶aj misiwbajaj atu ńßitaj mar~…ĺaamisaj nu tad…ômawan. ¶ajr~…ĺusipr~…ĺim mińß ¶aan dan-maj pa ¶akajan ni ta-r~…ĺin atu aj-sa-ni-ja amisan a r~…ĺar~…ĺaan sipa ¶akaj ¶i t…ôw-tun a masakaputaj. ¶uŇč-s…ô- ¶i a ta-r~…ĺin u kar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan nu tapaŇč a kitidaan. u si-o atu …ô Ē~ °-kuo kar~…ĺar~…ĺit…ômuńßan nu sasiwbajan. tidaaj nu tad…ômaw makaar~…ĺa tu war~…ĺu a mar~…ĺ…ôbut nu tad…ômawa, …ôn…ôm a bataan idaw ku …ôn…ôm ku r~…ĺaŇčan nu sapiputaw tu sakar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw. . kir~…ĺur~…ĺ mar~…ĺiŇčatu misir~…ĺud tu kiwkaj, d…ô-kuo tabaki ku nipiwawi…ôs. ¶ajr~…ĺimn…ôm ¶aj mińß ¶aan ta-r~…ĺin ar~…ĺaw mar~…ĺa zuj-din kitidaa nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaan, titida nu taamisan nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan tawja, u ta-r~…ĺin nu kakitidaan u zuj-din itida i ¶ajpi ¶ ¶ajs…ôp mińß ¶aan mikusan, nika itidaaj a d…ô-kuo tad…ômaw sakakaaj ¶i sa-ńßun pikuwanan madiput nida ku r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan atu sakaudip nu kakuwanan. sabaw siwa a mińß ¶aan ta-r~…ĺin a kakakur~…ĺian saan mińßidatu madiput ku minatu a tatapaŇčan. sabaw siwa a s…ô ¶i sadikudaj nu ¶a ¶aj a bataan, ta-r~…ĺin a …ô-r~…ĺuo-s…ô mar~…ĺami ¶id…ôkaj tu ku i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč. . ¶ajsiw ¶ajwar~…ĺ mińß ¶aan tusa a bur~…ĺad tusa a bataan idaw ku s…ôpat a d…ômiad, saan ku binawr~…ĺan nu ta-r~…ĺin musakamu, nika d…ôbuŇčan nu d…ô-kuo a ńßitaj, nikudan sa atu …ô Ē~ °-kuo mir~…ĺińßida tu aj-sa-ni-ja mar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw. ¶ajsiwtus…ôp mińß ¶aan tusa a bur~…ĺad tusa a d…ômiad atu …ô-r~…ĺuo-s…ô-su-wi-aj r~…ĺinpan s…ôńßuj ¶uji kunńß…ô-kuo makakijaku tu ta-…ô, …ô Ē~ °-kuo par~…ĺutat…ôŇčan tu aj-ni-ja kunńß…ô-kuo a nipisit…ôk…ôd. ta-r~…ĺin mar~…ĺa aj-sa-ni-ja tukaj. sakatusa nu nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan aj-sa-ni-ja mar~…ĺuajaw itida i ¶ajsiwsips…ôp mińß ¶aan - ¶ajsiwsip ¶aj mińß ¶aan d…ôbuŇčan nu su-r~…ĺin, ¶ajsiwsip ¶aj mińß ¶aan - ¶ajsiwsipsip mińß ¶aan d…ôbuŇčan na ¶a nu d…ô-kuo, ¶ajsiwsipsip mińß ¶aańß kina ¶a ¶aja ¶a d…ôbuŇčan nu su-r~…ĺin. pa ¶i ¶ian tu nu su-r~…ĺin ku aj-sa-ni-ja mir~…ĺ…ô ¶apu tu nuńß…ônian tu kun-ńß…ô-kuo, ta-r~…ĺin mar~…ĺaaj-sa-ni-ja su-wi-aj s…ôńßuj ¶uji kunńß…ôkuo a tukaj. **********, . ¶ajsiwwar~…ĺ mińß ¶aan muo-s…ô-k…ô piunduan, pikas…ôts…ôtan nu pajpaj itida i ta-r~…ĺin nu wai amis a pi-r~…ĺi-ta. **** . mat…ôn…ôsaj tu kinata-r~…ĺin nu mar~…ĺatur~…ĺuaj a nijadu Ē~ °an: ¶uo-tan-san "d…ô-ji :domb…ôrg", i r~…ĺikisian u mamikuwan nu ¶…ô- ¶iw, sajawaj mikuwanaj tina mar~…ĺumanaj a tukajan u ¶u ¶jaw, kir~…ĺur~…ĺ sa u taw-tun- ¶is…ô-tun atu puo-r~…ĺuo-ti-ńßaj a d…ô-ji- ¶…ô siidaaj a tad…ômaw, katukuńß ajdaaj nu aj-sa-ni-ja sińßu atu jadańßaj nu ta-s…ô-kun atu tapaŇč a kitidaan. :domb…ôrg) , . mar~…ĺumanaj a tukaj, u sumamadaj a ńßan-sa kapur~…ĺuŇčan nu nijadu Ē~ °, "binawr~…ĺan a tukaj", katukuńß i sabaw siwa a ńß…ôd…ôk nu mińß ¶aan, ina kitidaan ¶aaj kasar~…ĺitin atu kiwkaj. ina kitidaan kapańß ku nika ¶akatan, u tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan nu ¶un-s…ô- ¶i a nijadu Ē~ °an. ajdaaj nu aj-sa-ni-ja ¶aaj tu ka ńßa ¶i ¶a ku tad…ômaw. ***, . ir~…ĺikisi, ta-r~…ĺin nanid…ôbuŇčan, niar~…ĺawan, r~…ĺawp…ôsan kinapina a tajdan nu kukun miar~…ĺaw. ami ¶a ku nisakatusa nu kitakid a mar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw, su-r~…ĺin kajgun d…ôbuŇčan nuńß…ôni a mibakuńßa ¶ ku ta-r~…ĺin, nika mańßida tu ku mar~…ĺumanaj a tukajan, ina mar~…ĺumanaj a tukaj itida i ¶ajsiwsiwpi ¶ mańß ¶aan mapasiŇčan i r~…ĺin-ńß…ô-kuo kapur~…ĺuŇčan nu ¶udad a nur~…ĺiwan namaka babar~…ĺakiaj sa. ***, . katukuńß tu sabaw r~…ĺima a s…ô- ¶i nu ńß…ôd…ôk, ¶a ¶aj a bar~…ĺuńßaj nu ¶ajr~…ĺimsiw nu mi a tar~…ĺakaw, ina k…ô-d…ô-s…ô masadi ¶…ômaj a nisaŇčaan tu ta-r~…ĺi-s…ôn-aw-r~…ĺa-ńßu kiwkaj. i ¶ajr~…ĺimsipsiw mińß ¶aan katukuńß i ¶ajn…ômtur~…ĺim mińß ¶aan, u satar~…ĺakawaj nu kitakidan a nisaŇčaan tu r~…ĺumaan, kinapina a makatuduńß atu misabar~…ĺuńßaj misaŇčan, ajdaaj a nisaŇčaan tu tar~…ĺakaw makaar~…ĺa tu ¶ajtur~…ĺu kun- ¶…ô. ta-r~…ĺin satabakiaj nu banaw u r~…ĺaj-mi-s…ô-t…ô Ē~ °-ńßu, u ma ¶ima ¶ian a tapaŇč nu nananuman. sakatusa a banaw ńßan u ńßa-…ô-ku Ē~ °-ńßu. ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad atu duma a ma ¶ima ¶ian, ta-r~…ĺin ¶a ¶aj ku satabakiaj nu sauwa ¶ itida i ta-r~…ĺin nu inakaan a pi-r~…ĺi-ta. ja dadipasan tada u baŇč ¶ar~…ĺaj tu sisa mar~…ĺadadiputan nu kanatar~…ĺ. ** namaka ¶…ô-p…ôn- ¶u-ji sa, nipi ¶umuda tu o-mum, kapańß satu ku sakaudip. katuud tu ku mi ¶umudaj tu si-o. duma nu kanatar~…ĺ ńßun-r~…ĺan a kakur~…ĺian tajnitu i ta-r~…ĺin, pi ¶id…ôkan u sasiŇčaŇčanaj nu pisiwbajan u s…ô-tu-k…ô Ē~ °-man ¶a ¶akajan. namaka pai-o ¶…ôp…ôn a ńßuti…ôr~…ĺuan kakir~…ĺukir~…ĺu sa amisiwbaj. tat…ôŇčan , ta-r~…ĺin saan u ¶ja-r~…ĺi-ńßu-ni-ja- ¶uo-si-ku tus…ô r~…ĺuo-s…ô- ¶ja-tu-s…ô u mar~…ĺ…ôkakaaj kina ¶…ôn-s…ô. . aidaŇčan** ja-r~…ĺi-san-ta.na…ô-ńßu-s…ô- ¶i kiwkaj, patid…ôŇč i ¶ajwar~…ĺsiwsip* ¶ajsiws…ôps…ôp mińß ¶aan. ***** ****-*****. masa ¶a ¶aj satu, ma ¶akat ku pańßikukian atu bar~…ĺuŇčaan masasuŇčaaj tu ku aj-sa-ni-ja atu si-o, sisa ina ta-r~…ĺin mar~…ĺa tatajdaan nu aidaŇčan a tukaj. mańßida nikur~…ĺitan a mar~…ĺumanaj a tukajan u r~…ĺin-ńß…ô-kuo ¶udad nu masakaputaj nu kitakidan a namaka babar~…ĺakija, jadańß ku tajdaaj midaŇč. r~…ĺiwkan, kakan…ôn mabuwańß namin. tatajdan nu aidaŇčan u igu namin ku kamu. mar~…ĺumanaj a tukaj aj-sa-ni-ja pabar~…ĺuŇčaan a puo-w Ē~ °-kuo u satabakiaj nu aj-sa-ni-ja puo-w Ē~ °-kun, u tatajdaan nu katuudaj kija puo-w Ē~ °-kun. . aj-sa-ni-ja nipitukubi ¶uan kas…ônun sa ma ¶akat ku sakaudip, ma ¶akat ma ¶akat ku tuud. ¶aaj tu kaw tadamat…ôk…ôsaj, nika ¶aaj tu pikikaka tu tun-o a kanatar~…ĺan. tusa ku tapaŇč nu tatajdaan midan. ¶aaj ka tabaki kja sumamadaj a ma ¶i, ńßamaw ńßan mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ mamintu adińßan. war~…ĺian a pi-r~…ĺi-ta nijadu Ē~ °an atu ka-d…ô-r~…ĺi-aw u tatajdaan tu a midaŇč. aj-sa-ni-ja sakajńß…ôkar~…ĺ a puo-w Ē~ °-kun itida i tipan, mi ¶api tu r~…ĺuo-ka-a-…ô-ma-r~…ĺ…ôi, mańßida tu ku aj-sa-ni-ja nijadu Ē~ °an a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan atu saŇčan nu r~…ĺumaan.
S.FORM: == Ta-linŚ°Ēśěó == likisiś≠∑ŚŹ≤ itida i Fen-lan-wan nutipa a dadipasan idaw tu ku palutatengaan tu itida nu kun-yen tusa a malebut nu mihcaan idaw tu ku masakaputay nu musakamuay tu Pu-luo a Fen-lan a kamuan nu niyadu'an itini tu a siluma'. MalaE-luo-se atu Kan-sen-na-wi-ya sasiwbayan nu tapang a minatuan, Ta-lin malaDan-may kanatal sa ahebalay a panutekan, itida i caytucaysiw mihcaan nikuda nu Ta-lin u Dan-may ku mikuwanay. . amis nu hetay tawya u kilisetu namin ku itidaay a tademaw. caytuwallim mihcaan ya maci malaHan-sa, cacay Pae-o duma nu De-kuo tademaw nu tukay a cacay misiwbayay atu hitay malaamisay nu tademawan. caylusiplim mihcaan Dan-may pacakayan ni Ta-lin atu Ay-sa-ni-ya amisan a lalaan sipacakay ci Tew-tun a masakaputay. cung-se-ci a Ta-lin u kalepacawan nu tapang a kitidaan. u Si-o atu E'-kuo kalalitemuhan nu sasiwbayan. tidaay nu tademaw makaala tu walu a malebut nu tademawa, enem a bataan idaw ku enem ku langan nu sapiputaw tu sakalepacaw. . kilul malingatu misilud tu kiwkay, De-kuo tabaki ku nipiwawies. caylimnemcay mihcaan Ta-lin alaw mala Zuy-din kitidaa nu lalaan, titida nu Taamisan nikalepacawan tawya, u Ta-lin nu kakitidaan u Zuy-din itida i caypiccaysep mihcaan mikusan, nika itidaay a De-kuo tademaw sakakaay ci Sa-hun pikuwanan madiput nida ku lalangawan atu sakaudip nu kakuwanan. sabaw siwa a mihcaan Ta-lin a kakakulian saan mihidatu madiput ku minatu a tatapangan. sabaw siwa a seci sadikuday nu cacay a bataan, Ta-lin a E-luo-se malamicidekay tu ku icelang. . caysiwcaywal mihcaan tusa a bulad tusa a bataan idaw ku sepat a demiad, saan ku binawlan nu Ta-lin musakamu, nika debungan nu De-kuo a hitay, nikudan sa atu E'-kuo milihida tu Ay-sa-ni-ya malepacaw. Caysiwtusep mihcaan tusa a bulad tusa a demiad atu E-luo-se-su-wi-ay linpan sehuy cuyi kunhe-kuo makakiyaku tu Ta-e, E'-kuo palutatengan tu Ay-ni-ya kunhe-kuo a nipisiteked. Ta-lin mala Ay-sa-ni-ya tukay. sakatusa nu nikalepacawan Ay-sa-ni-ya maluayaw itida i caysiwsipsep mihcaan -caysiwsipcay mihcaan debungan nu Su-lin, caysiwsipcay mihcaan - caysiwsipsip mihcaan debungan naca nu De-kuo, caysiwsipsip mihcaah kinacacayaca debungan nu Su-lin. pacician tu nu Su-lin ku Ay-sa-ni-ya milecapu tu nuhenian tu kun-he-kuo, Ta-lin malaAy-sa-ni-ya Su-wi-ay sehuy cuyi kunhekuo a tukay. 1918ŚĻī2śúą24śó•, . caysiwwal mihcaan Muo-se-ke piunduan, pikasetsetan nu paypay itida i Ta-lin nu wai amis a Pi-li-ta. 1980 . matenesay tu kinaTa-lin nu malatuluay a niyadu'an: Cuo-tan-san "De-yi :Domberg", i likisian u mamikuwan nu ce-ciw, sayaway mikuwanay tina malumanay a tukayan u cucyaw, kilul sa u Taw-tun-cise-tun atu Puo-luo-ti-hay a de-yi-ce siidaay a tademaw, katukuh aydaay nu Ay-sa-ni-ya sihu atu yadahay nu Ta-se-kun atu tapang a kitidaan. :Domberg) , . malumanay a tukay, u sumamaday a Han-sa kapulungan nu niyadu', "binawlan a tukay", katukuh i sabaw siwa a hedek nu mihcaan, ina kitidaan caay kasalitin atu kiwkay. ina kitidaan kapah ku nikacakatan, u tatelungan nu cun-se-ci a niyadu'an. aydaay nu Ay-sa-ni-ya caay tu ka hacica ku tademaw. ŤÄĀŚüéŚćÄ, . ilikisi, Ta-lin nanidebungan, nialawan, lawpesan kinapina a taydan nu kukun mialaw. amica ku nisakatusa nu kitakid a malepacaw, Su-lin kaygun debungan nuheni a mibakuhac ku Ta-lin, nika mahida tu ku malumanay a tukayan, ina malumanay a tukay itida i caysiwsiwpic mahcaan mapasingan i Lin-he-kuo kapulungan nu cudad a nuliwan namaka babalakiay sa. ś≠∑ŚŹ≤šłä, . katukuh tu sabaw lima a se-ci nu hedek, cacay a baluhay nu caylimsiw nu mi a talakaw, ina Ke-de-se masadicemay a nisangaan tu Ta-li-sen-aw-la-hu kiwkay. i caylimsipsiw mihcaan katukuh i caynemtulim mihcaan, u satalakaway nu kitakidan a nisangaan tu lumaan, kinapina a makatuduh atu misabaluhay misangan, aydaay a nisangaan tu talakaw makaala tu caytulu kun-ce. Ta-lin satabakiay nu banaw u Lay-mi-se-te'-hu, u macimacian a tapang nu nananuman. sakatusa a banaw han u Ha-e-ku'-hu. caay kalecad atu duma a macimacian, Ta-lin cacay ku satabakiay nu sauwac itida i Ta-lin nu inakaan a Pi-li-ta. ya dadipasan tada u bangcalay tu sisa maladadiputan nu kanatal. 47 namaka ce-pen-cu-yi sa, nipicumuda tu O-mum, kapah satu ku sakaudip. katuud tu ku micumuday tu Si-o. duma nu kanatal Hun-lan a kakulian taynitu i Ta-lin, picidekan u sasinganganay nu pisiwbayan u se-tu-ke'-man cacakayan. namaka Pai-o cepen a hutieluan kakilukilu sa amisiwbay. tatengan , Ta-lin saan u Cya-li-hu-ni-ya-cuo-si-ku tuse Luo-se-cya-tu-se u malekakaay kina cen-se. . aidanganśóÖťĀä Ya-li-san-ta.Nae-hu-se-ci kiwkay, patideng i caywalsiwsip‚ÄĒcaysiwsepsep mihcaan. šļěś≠∑ŚĪĪŚ§ß¬∑ 1894-1900ŚĻī. masacacay satu, macakat ku pahikukian atu balungaan masasungaay tu ku Ay-sa-ni-ya atu Si-o, sisa ina Ta-lin mala tataydaan nu aidangan a tukay. mahida nikulitan a malumanay a tukayan u lin-he-kuo cudad nu masakaputay nu kitakidan a namaka babalakiya, yadah ku taydaay midang. Liwkan, kakanen mabuwah namin. tataydan nu aidangan u igu namin ku kamu. malumanay a tukay Ay-sa-ni-ya pabalungaan a puo-w'-kuo u satabakiay nu Ay-sa-ni-ya puo-w'-kun, u tataydaan nu katuuday kiya puo-w'-kun. . Ay-sa-ni-ya nipitukubicuan kasenun sa macakat ku sakaudip, macakat macakat ku tuud. caay tu kaw tadamatekesay, nika caay tu pikikaka tu Tun-o a kanatalan. tusa ku tapang nu tataydaan midan. caay ka tabaki kya sumamaday a maci, hamaw han muculil mamintu adihan. walian a Pi-li-ta niyadu'an atu Ka-de-li-aw u tataydaan tu a midang. Ay-sa-ni-ya sakayhekal a Puo-w'-kun itida i tipan, micapi tu Luo-ka-a-e-ma-lei, mahida tu ku Ay-sa-ni-ya niyadu'an a lalangawan atu sangan nu lumaan.
